project_type: Node.js zero-dependency server + Vanilla JS PWA, event management platform
build_system: No build step. Server runs with Node.js >= 18, no npm install needed.
test_framework: Custom smoke test in server/test/smoke.mjs - spawns server with --demo, runs HTTP assertions
verification_instructions: Run 'npm test' from repo root. All tests must pass (currently 190). Server starts with 'node server/main.js --demo'.
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Node.js >= 18 is the only prerequisite. No npm install.
environment_constraints: Zero npm dependencies. All code is self-contained. Tests spawn a real server instance.
contribution_requirements: Modules follow server/modules/*.mod.js pattern. Views follow web/js/views/*.js pattern. Service Worker cache must include new view files. Tests must be added to server/test/smoke.mjs.
key_patterns: Server modules export { name, title, version, description, routes({ get, post, patch, del }, { db, bus, feed }) }. Utility imports from ../kernel/util.js. Views export async function viewName({ onCleanup, refresh }). DOM helpers from ../core/dom.js. API from ../core/api.js. Store from ../core/store.js. Desktop shell NAV array in web/js/shell/desktop.js. Tablet shell in web/js/shell/tablet.js. SW cache in web/sw.js SHELL array.
directory_structure: server/ (main.js entry, kernel/ for core infra, modules/ for feature modules, test/ for tests, seed/ for demo data), web/ (PWA frontend: js/core/, js/shell/, js/views/, css/), kmp/ (Kotlin multiplatform shell)
